lines.english: O Nanak, their faces are radiant. ||4||3||141||
The slaves of God are good.
Hey, soul: your only Support is the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰੁ ਜਿ ਕਰਨ ਕਰਾਵਨੋ ਤਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਭਉ ਹੈ ਜਾਮ ਕਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: avar ji karan karaavano tin meh bhau hai jaam kaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whatever else you do or make happen, the fear of death still hangs over you. ||1||Pause||
He is not obtained by any other efforts.
Good deeds done in the pride of ego are swept away,
By great good fortune, meditate on the Lord. ||1||
but not even one will be of any use at all hereafter. ||2||
You may know hundreds of thousands of clever tricks,
Nanak receives the Naam in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||4||4||142||
Like the house of sand by water. ||3||
When God the Merciful shows His Mercy,
I am a sacrifice, dedicated hundreds of thousands of times, to my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੋ ਹੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਕੋ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਅਧਰੀਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naamo ho naam saahib ko praan adhareea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: His Name, and His Name alone, is the Support of the breath of life. ||1||Pause||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
You are the Support of all beings and creatures. ||1||
You alone are the Doer, the Cause of causes.
O God, You are my power, authority and youth.
You are absolute, without attributes, and also related, with the most sublime attributes. ||2||
By Guru's Grace, some understand You. ||3||
God is All-knowing, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.
Here and hereafter, You are my Savior and Protector.
You are Nanak's strength and support. ||4||5||143||
Worship and adore the Lord, Har, Har, Har.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਭਰਮੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਭਉ ਸਾਧੀਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: santasang har man vasai bharam mohu bhau saadheeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, He dwells in the mind; doubt, emotional attachment and fear are vanquished. ||1||Pause||
that the Lord's servant dwells as the highest of all. ||1||
The Vedas, the Puraanas and the Simritees are heard to proclaim
People wander through 8.4 million incarnations.
All places are filled with fear - know this well.
Only the Lord's servants are free of fear. ||2||
Nanak has taken to the Sanctuary of the Lord's Holy Saints. ||4||6||144||
God's people are not subject to birth and death. ||3||
He has given up power, wisdom, cleverness and egotism.
O my mind, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord's Name.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਤ ਨੀਤ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: neet neet har seveeai saas saas har dhiaaeeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Serve the Lord continually and continuously; with each and every breath, meditate on the Lord. ||1||Pause||
and pain, suffering, darkness and doubt depart. ||1||
In the Society of the Saints, the Lord dwells in the mind,
By the Grace of the Saints, is not afflicted with pain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਗੁਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau gur har mantru de |
lines.english: Those unto whom the Guru gives the Mantra of the Lord's Name,
are saved from the fire of Maya. ||3||
That humble being, who meditates on the Lord,
Be kind to Nanak, O God;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਵਾਸੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ॥੪॥੭॥੧੪੫॥
lines.translit: merai man tan vaasai naam har |4|7|145|
lines.english: let the Lord's Name dwell within my mind and body. ||4||7||145||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
With your tongue, chant the Name of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਹਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਆਨੰਦੁ ਘਨਾ ਆਗੈ ਜੀਅ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eehaa sukh aanand ghanaa aagai jeea kai sang kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In this world, it shall bring you peace, comfort and great joy; hereafter, it shall go with your soul, and shall be of use to you. ||1||Pause||
The disease of your ego shall be eradicated.
Those who taste the sublime essence of the Lord

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਕਰਿ ਰਾਜ ਜੋਗੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: toon gur prasaad kar raaj jog |1|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, practice Raja Yoga, the Yoga of meditation and success. ||1||
Those who have found the Lord, the Treasure of peace,
have their thirst quenched. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਕਤ ਹੀ ਧਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: so bahur na kat hee dhaaeaa |3|
lines.english: shall not go anywhere else again. ||3||
- O Nanak, their fears are removed. ||4||8||146||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam jaa kau gur deea |
lines.english: Those, unto whom the Guru has given the Lord's Name, Har, Har
